title: Senior Frontend Developer at OLX India

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at OLX India
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Frontend Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!
